thumbnail.selected_title: When Does a Bold Promise Become a Crime?
thumbnail.reason: Best current combination of story clarity, mobile legibility, rights safety, and brand fit.

narration.note: Final render uses the approved ElevenLabs master-derived mix; no regeneration was performed.

risk_notes: Theranos is R3: living-person legal/rights review required before publish; visuals must stay symbolic and avoid Holmes/Balwani likeness.
final_package_notes: Final render is a candidate for owner/R3 legal review only; no upload, schedule, or publish approval is implied.
Factory and stock visuals are generic illustrative material, not evidence of Theranos facilities, devices, people, or logos.
